text.content:
Source: Anime 5E Folstavia: The Infinite Crossroads, PDF pp. 14, 256.

Folstavia is the official Anime 5E fantasy setting, known as the Infinite Crossroads because anomalies in space and time have connected it to other realities for millennia.

The setting supports a wide range of fantasy campaigns across its lands and planes, with new Species, Classes, Attributes, equipment, monsters, neomorphs, pantheons, factions, and regional adventure hooks intended for later source-backed expansion.
